profile.headline: Gen AI Engineer
profile.summary:
An Engineer who likes to make things simple and beautiful. Specialized in Agentic AI system design, building Gen AI application development, Finetuning, pipeline building and deploying. Have strong knowledge on transformers, pytorch, Data Structures and Algorithms.

I approach AI with an engineering-first mindset: clear problem framing, strong data foundations, disciplined evaluation, and scalable delivery. I value systems that work consistently in production over solutions that only perform well in isolation.

experience.title: AI Engineer
experience.summary:
Build AI-driven Agentic business workflow automation that including complex orchestration, implemented multiple collabration platform, cross platform functionalities, mail summarizing systems with unstructured data using RAG architecture, Graph database, chromaDB, Embedded systems, and mistral LLM. Worked with n8n, power apps, google apps, data driven api’s, and pinecone vector database. By implementing this our Enterprise partner was able to reduce manual work time by
40 percent and increase productivity.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.summary: Experiencing cutting edge technologies like Open source LLM , fine tuning models, ML deployment, Python, Graph DB, Pytest. By accessing this open source models and open source platforms we build variety of models using RAG architecture.

experience.title: Full-Stack Developer-Intern
experience.summary:
Hey, here i working as a backend developer and contributed in a payment gateway application development. 
Contribution:
*Developed and maintained the backend infrastructure of a robust payment gateway application, ensuring seamless and secure transaction processing.

*Collaborated with cross-functional teams, including front-end developers and quality assurance, to implement new features and enhance the overall functionality of the payment gateway.

*Implemented RESTful APIs to facilitate communication between the front-end and backend systems, optimizing data flow and reducing latency.
